field_values.action_summary: The protagonist explores a nearby glass-roofed enclosure. Inside, he observes hundreds of large white eggs, some of which have hatched into grotesque, six-limbed creatures with antennae and independent eyes.
field_values.camera_intent: Macro shots of eggs and hatching creatures; Medium shots of protagonist peering through glass; Tracking shots following movement toward structure
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Egg state (hatched vs unhatched) must remain consistent per shot
Six-limbed creature movement patterns must be uniform
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the biological threat and lifecycle of the alien species through a visual progression from curiosity to horror. The sequence must emphasize the scale of the infestation within the glass enclosure using macro details of hatching creatures contrasted against the protagonist's physical reaction.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter, physically fit)

## Required Environments
- martian_incubator_enclosure (low, walled glass enclosure inside a circular basin with yellowish moss and quartz rocks)

## Continuity Constraints
- Egg state (hatched vs unhatched) must remain consistent per shot
- Six-limbed creature movement patterns must be uniform (antennae and independent eyes)

## Beat List
- BT001: protagonist approaches the incubator
- BT002: observation of the eggs
- BT003: discovery of hatching creatures
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
